creator: petef@databits.net
text:
I'm not sure what I was thinking when I couldn't find a version number
from 4.8 so I just upped the PORTREVISION.  The new version is just
"2000c", they (U Washington) are no longer using the major.minor
revision scheme, I guess.

Updated patch at http://hex.databits.net/~petef/diffs/cclient.diff.

-pete

-- 
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
Databits Network Services, Inc. <http://databits.net>
